titlePath: ## Docling RAG Evidence This document proves the

chunks.text: This document proves the FaceSpeed Voice RAG main path. The avatar should move while the Riva audio answer plays. The answer package must include input audio, output audio, citations, and a video showing the 3D model moving. The retrieval path must use Docling parsing, embedding search, and reranking.
